cadence: one new rung on the first session of each month

regime.filter: enter only when SPY >= its 200-day average

call.label: Bull call spread (max ROR)
call.today_action: HOLD — 6 rungs open, GTC limits working; next rung on the first session of next month

put.label: Put credit spread (max accuracy)
put.today_action: HOLD — 2 rungs open, GTC limits working; next rung on the first session of next month

note: Modeled Black-Scholes fills (IV = 60d realized x 1.12); SPY/SPX options are the most liquid listed, so fills are realistic. ~87-94% accurate, NOT 99% — the ROR comes with real bear-market losers, and concurrent rungs lose together in a crash (the 30% at-risk cap bounds that).
